india_trends.title: Up 60% in a month! Ola Electric shares to be in focus next week on 20% growth in April sales
india_trends.summary: Ola Electric shares snapped their 6-month losing streak in April as the counter rallied a whopping 61.63% on a sharp turnaround in its sales performance.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: UAE exit from OPEC - How will it impact crude oil prices, market dynamics, oil cartel's future and geopolitics?
india_trends.summary: The UAE's exit from OPEC signals a strategic shift towards increased production autonomy amidst a changing oil market. Rücker expects oil prices to ease over time, while geopolitical tensions could create volatility in trade and prices.

india_trends.title: India supplies 20% of global generic medicines; its IP rules WTO-compliant: GTRI

india_trends.title: US raises concerns at India’s duties on IP-intensive goods, source code, AI working paper
india_trends.summary: The US has voiced concerns over India's high customs duties on IP-intensive products and its proposed mandatory blanket license for AI developers using copyrighted works. India remains on the US's 'Priority Watch List' for inadequate IP protection, with specific worries about trade secret disclosure

india_trends.title: Noida International Airport to begin passenger flights from June 15; IndiGo to operate first service
india_trends.summary: Noida International Airport will open for commercial flights on June 15, 2026. IndiGo will operate the inaugural flight. india_trends.title: India, UK discuss ways to boost bilateral trade
india_trends.summary: India and the UK held a virtual meeting to boost trade and investment. Discussions focused on leveraging the Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement signed last year. The agreement aims to increase bilateral trade significantly. This pact will allow 99 percent of Indian exports duty-free entry in

india_trends.title: Groww, BSE to Angel One: Over 10 capital market stocks jump up to 43% in April amid market revival
india_trends.summary: April marked a recovery for capital market stocks, with Groww and Angel One leading gains. The Nifty Capital Market index surged 23.20% as easing geopolitical tensions and positive earnings reports fueled investor enthusiasm, reversing four months of declines.

india_trends.title: Private Credit’s Retail Risk Draws Scrutiny From Global Watchdog
india_trends.summary: The world’s top financial stability watchdog is examining the potential risks posed by an influx of retail investors into the $1.8 trillion private credit market, according to a person with knowledge of the matter.

india_trends.title: Emerging Markets Eke Out Gains in Thin-Volume Holiday Trading
india_trends.summary: Emerging-market benchmarks for stocks and currencies posted small gains in holiday-thinned trade, with most markets in Asia, Europe and Africa closed for Labour Day.

india_trends.title: Petrol, diesel price hike in near future not ruled out, say govt sources
india_trends.summary: Fuel prices may rise soon. Government sources indicate a potential increase in petrol and diesel rates. This comes as oil companies face mounting losses. Retail prices have been frozen for four years. Global crude oil prices have surged significantly. This situation puts pressure on state-owned oil

india_trends.title: Give our bullion back: India wants its gold under own lock and key
india_trends.summary: India is rapidly repatriating its gold reserves, bringing the majority home from overseas vaults. This strategic shift, driven by trust concerns and a desire for greater control, reflects a global trend of nations prioritizing physical sovereignty over foreign custody. The move ensures immediate acc

india_trends.title: India maintained stable energy supplies amid crisis, shielded people from global price shocks: Hardeep Singh Puri
india_trends.summary: India has successfully shielded consumers from global energy price shocks despite disruptions from the Strait of Hormuz closure. Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri stated that the country absorbed fiscal impacts rather than passing them to consumers, maintaining stable retail fuel prices for 60 days

india_trends.title: Nifty 50 slips below 24,000. Next key levels to watch
india_trends.summary: On April 30, Indian stock indices fell nearly 1% due to rising crude oil prices and foreign fund exits. The Nifty 50 and Sensex closed at 23,997.55 and 76,913.50, respectively. Despite this, both indices showed weekly gains, breaking previous losing streaks.

india_trends.title: Sell in May & Go Away: Is it the right strategy as US-Iran war and crude oil prices wreak havoc on portfolios?
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 index has risen in six of the last 10 years during May. But the crude oil prices remain a joker in the pack for India. According to experts, the trajectory of crude oil remains the single largest short-term risk variable.

india_trends.title: RBL Bank, Canara Bank to PNB - Who will be impacted the most by RBI ECL norms? Explained
india_trends.summary: Several PSBs have indicated that the one-time provisioning hit could reduce net worth by 3–9%. In contrast, large private sector banks appear better positioned due to stronger provision buffers, estimated at 2–4% of net worth.

india_trends.title: Maruti Suzuki India posts record sales at 2,39,646 units in Apr
india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki India achieved a record total sales of 2,39,646 units in April. This marks a significant 33.29 percent year-on-year growth. india_trends.summary: India's auto market saw strong growth in April. Two-wheeler sales increased significantly, outpacing passenger vehicles. Commercial vehicle volumes also rose steadily.
